metadata.summary: Maintain prioritized healthy backlog via DEEP and INVEST principles. Weekly grooming, clear ready definition, prevents dumping ground.

content.title: Backlog Management
content.summary: Apply DEEP and INVEST. Maintain 2-4 sprints ready, <100 total, <10% stale.

why.p: Backlogs as storage accumulate hundreds. Kills velocity. Healthy backlog makes planning fast, execution clear.
